svg.text: Irrigation fault simulator — electrical circuit (controller, relay, wiring)

Controller PSU/logic → per-zone triac taps → field wires → solenoid coils → shared COMMON return, plus the pump-start relay loop and 230 V motor feed. Gold = energised, grey = de-energised; red ✕ = the injected fault.

g.text: S1 Electrical - cond.common broken (shared coil return)
S2 Valve pilot loop - Z1 metering_port clogged (only Z2 commanded)
S3 Hydraulic leak - Z1.hose1 burst (Z1 commanded)
